sections.heading:
Ads That Stop The Scroll.
Conversions That Don't Lie.
sections.subheading: Ad Misfits builds high-performing creative for DTC brands. We speak performance metrics, not design awards. Brands using our creative see 2-4x ROAS improvements within 90 days.

sections.heading: How We Drive Real Results
sections.subheading: Three pillars that separate us from every other creative agency.

items.title: 5-Day Creative Turnaround
items.description: Brief to live ad in 5 business days. No waiting. No excuses. Our production system is engineered for speed without sacrificing performance.

items.title: Performance-First Creative
items.description: Every pixel is designed to convert. We A/B test hooks, headlines, and visuals. Your metrics guide our decisions, not our opinions.

items.title: Transparent Performance Reporting
items.description: You own the data. Weekly performance reviews tie every creative decision to CTR, CVR, CPC, and ROAS. No black boxes.

sections.heading: Results From Brands Like Yours
sections.subheading: Real numbers from real clients who stopped burning budget.

items.quote: In 60 days, we went from 1.8x to 4.2x ROAS. Ad Misfits understood our customer better than our in-house team.
items.author: Priya Mehta

items.quote: They speak media buyer language. Not just beautiful ads — ads that scale. Our CAC dropped 31%.
items.author: Jordan Tse

items.quote: Their UGC hooks cut our CPMs by 38% while improving CTR. The process was seamless.
items.author: Marcus Webb

sections.heading: Ready to Stop Wasting Money on Bad Creative?
sections.description: Get your free 30-minute creative audit. We'll review your current ads, identify exactly where you're losing conversions, and show you what we'd do differently. No credit card required.

sections.heading: Questions? We've Got Answers.
sections.subheading: Everything you need to know before booking that audit.

items.question: What platforms do you create for?
items.answer: Meta (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok, YouTube, and Pinterest. We build static images, UGC video, short-form produced video, carousels, and motion graphics — whatever format converts for your audience.

items.question: How fast is 5 days really?
items.answer: 5 business days from an approved brief to live ad. Emergency projects get 48-hour turnaround (small rush fee). We've optimized our entire workflow to move fast without cutting corners.

items.question: Do I have to lock in a long contract?
items.answer: Month-to-month or project-based. We want to earn your business every month. Most clients stay 12+ months because results keep improving.

items.question: What do you need to get started?
items.answer: Your brand brief, ad account access (read-only), and your best-performing existing creatives. The more customer insight you give us, the faster we dial in your winners.

items.question: Why are you better than other agencies?
items.answer: We're performance marketers who learned to design, not designers who learned to run ads. Our incentives align with yours — we only win when your metrics improve. No vanity metrics, no awards, just ROAS.
